turns.user_message: My friend said I seem off lately. I just feel like I'm running on fumes.
People keep asking if I'm okay and I don't know what to say. I feel completely hollowed out inside.
Someone told me I look like a ghost and they're right. I feel like I'm completely disappearing.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This just started recently.
